scenarios.description: sourceRange returns UntrackedAttr when parent is null (parent == null branch)
sourceRange returns parent.sourceRange(key) when parent is non-null (parent != null branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Range.AttributeRange with startTagStart=1,startTagEnd=2,endTagStart=3,endTagEnd=4
pseudocode: Attributes stubParent = new Attributes(){ public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String k){ return new Range.AttributeRange(1,2,3,4);} };
